name: agent-coordination
description: > Agent spawning, lifecycle management, and coordination patterns. Manages 60+ agent types with specialized capabilities. Use when: spawning agents, coordinating multi-agent tasks, managing agent pools. Skip when: single-agent work, no coordination needed.
author: ruvnet
summary_zh: 这是个多智能体管理调度工具，负责智能体的创建、生命周期与协作。适合需要批量管理智能体池、让它们协同完成复杂任务的场景，单打独斗的活儿用不上。
